title: ビギナー向け読書週間？

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hayahide, Ikuno! Sorry for keeping you!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Is that the book?! Our efforts have borne fruit at
last!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The book recommendation guide designed for
non-readers we toiled over so long!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That's right! This is our guide to encourage
reading during fall reading week among those
who hate books.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Our free publication, The Readers' Guide to Making Reading Fun ♪, is complete at last!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And you two are to thank for all your help! As a
student librarian, I couldn't be more grateful.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's have a look inside, shall we? We can
start with Hayahide's recommendations...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The theme for my article was "trends." I included
many books that modern students would find
interesting to read.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's filled with the most cutting-edge and latest
theories on racing submitted from the world of
academia!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Ohh... So with your entries, anyone could easily
stay up to date with trending theories!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I think students who like to follow trends will find
that very interesting!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Next is me. I made my recommendations around
the theme "dreams."

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
In column format, I've listed numerous books from
which you can learn various management
techniques useful toward achieving your dreams.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see! And since your lineup of books is primarily
business-related, you've included explanations to
help students with their comprehension.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Your article is sure to help students work toward
their dreams!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
So, um... well... I decided to be adventurous and
went with the theme "humor."

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The title of my article is "How to Enjoy The Tale
of Don Quixote Through Other Literature"!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... You aim to give a unique
perspective on the history of 17th century
literature by means of modern interpretation.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Once they've read your recommendations, I'm
positive they'll keel over with laughter at Don
Quixote's antics!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I... I agree! When I think about all the new readers
that'll come from our zine... I get so excited!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their free zine becomes a big hit, and reading
week enjoys a boon of popularity... among the
already existing reader circle.
